title: How China and U.S. eased the Middle East oil shock and kept prices from spiking even higher
summary_full: China and the U.S., the world's two largest economies, wield great influence over the oil market and are using it to help plug the supply gap.
summary_public: China and the U.S., the world's two largest economies, wield great influence over the oil market and are using it to help plug the supply gap.
